Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Hate Bind
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 2 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +11% (augmented)
Pack Size: +9% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +44% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +60% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Painful" (Tier: 1) }
19(15-19)% increased Monster Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Shattering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters Break Armour equal to 27(25-30)% of Physical Damage dealt
{ Prefix Modifier "Destructive" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 200(200-240)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Monsters have +22(21-25)% Critical Damage Bonus
{ Suffix Modifier "of Overpowering" (Tier: 1) }
Monster have 100(100-119)% increased Elemental Ailment Application
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
